completedActions.name: Add static SCHEMA getter to Identifiable class with id field, namespace scvoice.nameforma
Add static schemaOf(ItemClass) method to FormaCollection returning {ItemType}FormaCollection schema
Update test/action.ts to use FormaCollection.schemaOf(Action) instead of inline schema
Run tests to verify all pass

name: Add FormaCollection Avro schema support

references.text: Decision: Add SCHEMA to Identifiable (non-breaking, type-safe solution)
Namespace standard: scvoice.nameforma for all schemas
Avro recommends: namespace as reverse domain, name in PascalCase

summary: Add SCHEMA to Identifiable and schemaOf() static method to FormaCollection for type-safe Avro serialization of collections
